positive: A highly stylized, minimalist illustration of a celestial fox (kitsune) sitting amidst stylized constellations and watercolor nebula. The fox should have sharp, elegant lines and a striking, ethereal glow, rendered in a deep sapphire blue and cosmic magenta palette. The composition should be centered, with the fox forming a powerful silhouette against a deep, starry void. Incorporate flowing geometric patterns and stylized mountain peaks in the background, giving it an otherworldly, premium streetwear aesthetic. Strong contrast between the vibrant glow and the dark background. High detail, clean vector lines, perfect for t-shirt print.
negative: low quality, blurry, noise, artifact, watermark, text, logo, copyright, cartoon, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts
